## Summary

- Add or update a Caribbean tech community listing

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated the entry in `data/communities.json`
- [ ] I regenerated the generated files (`npm run generate` and `npm run build:site`)
- [ ] The community is relevant to tech and the Caribbean
- [ ] The join link is the most direct link I could provide
- [ ] I verified the link recently
- [ ] I checked for duplicate listings
- [ ] I did not include private information without permission

## Notes

Include any context that would help maintainers review this submission.
